title: Ungaran Heat Wave
lead: Ungaran is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.06. This anomaly is expected to have severe impacts on the city.
body:
The current heat wave in Ungaran has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperature is causing an increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 9.7 GG, while the Humidity is at 67% and the wind speed is 3.5 km/h. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to this extreme weather condition.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave immediately.
